fields.name: The Pinnacle Residences
fields.description: An exquisite 4BHK apartment in the prestigious Vasant Vihar neighbourhood. Features panoramic city views, Italian marble flooring, modular kitchen, and world-class amenities including a rooftop pool, gymnasium, and 24/7 concierge service.

fields.name: Emerald Bay Apartments
fields.description: Spacious 3BHK fully furnished apartment in Dwarka's most sought-after complex. Walking distance to the metro, surrounded by green spaces, with dedicated parking and 24/7 security.

fields.name: Grand Palazzo Suite
fields.description: Ultra-luxury penthouse in the heart of Lutyens' Delhi. Designed by award-winning architects, this palatial residence offers private terrace gardens, smart home automation, and an exclusive address in India's most prestigious neighbourhood.

fields.name: Skyline Heights
fields.description: Modern 3BHK apartment in Gurugram's premium tech corridor. Surrounded by multinational offices, world-class malls, and excellent connectivity to Delhi via NH-48.

fields.name: The Heritage Villas
fields.description: Expansive independent villa with private garden, swimming pool, and servant quarters. Located in Greater Noida West's most exclusive gated township with club facilities.

fields.name: Meridian Business Tower
fields.description: Premium commercial office space in Delhi's iconic business district. Fully fitted Grade-A workspace with floor-to-ceiling glazing, dedicated parking, conference facilities, and prime CP address.

fields.name: Arjun Mehta
fields.text: Capital Consultancy made finding our dream home in South Delhi an absolute delight. Their team was professional, patient, and incredibly knowledgeable about the market.

fields.name: Priya Sharma
fields.text: As a first-time investor, I was nervous. The team guided me through every step, from market analysis to final registration. My property has already appreciated 22% in two years.

fields.name: Rakesh Verma
fields.text: We relocated from Mumbai and needed a premium office space in Connaught Place. Capital Consultancy found the perfect fit within 10 days. Exceptional service and expertise.

fields.name: Sunita Kapoor
fields.text: The property management services are outstanding. They handle everything so I can focus on my business. Transparent reporting and professional tenant relationships.
